creator: steve@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Funny you should mention this.  Per our conversation I started 
watching PRs come in to see why they were being misfiled.  It seems 
in most cases (and yours in particular) the 'Category:' was not 
filled in or it was put on the next line.  When GNATS gets confused 
it sets the category to pending and assigns the PR to gnats-admin. 
I will work on putting a newer version of send-pr in the tree later 
this week.
